### exit 0
### stdout
### stderr

stow dir path relative to target $SANDBOX/target is ../stow
Planning stow of: pkg ...
Planning stow of package pkg...
    level of f is 0
LINK: f => ../stow/pkg/f
Planning stow of package pkg... done
Processing tasks...
Processing tasks... done
### tree

dir  stow
dir  stow/pkg
